series_metadata.series_description: Official copy of the minutes of the Ohio Public Employees Deferred Compensation Board.

retention_rules.disposition: Paper: Retain paper originals Permanently onsite after microfilming. ; Microform: Send the original microfilm to the State Archives and the silver negative (duplicate microfilm) to the State Microfilm Lab. Microfilming is scheduled in such a manner as to ensure that the original microfilm is sent to the State Archives five years after the creation of the paper copy., Paper: Permanent ; Microform: Permanent
